query: set up Maximo for Genie in our workspace
expected_behavior: Phase 0: runs scripts/introspect_schema.py to profile the data BEFORE interviewing (omits --profile in-workspace)
Presents profiled findings: distinct WOCLASS/STATUS/WORKTYPE, SITEIDs, CLASSSTRUCTUREIDs, detected custom columns, modules in use, PLUSG presence
Interview Batch 0 (industry & how they use Maximo) goes first, grounded in the profile
Asks only the gaps the data can't prove (status meaning, PM-vs-CM, jargon, custom-column meaning, KPI definitions) and never finalizes a profiled candidate without confirmation
Generated glossary frontmatter follows the standard (parent: maximo-overview, metadata.version, no tags) and includes an Industry & Maximo usage section
